content.text:
Introduction to English

English is a West Germanic language that originated in Anglo-Saxon England and has become the most widely spoken language in the world.

What You'll Learn:

  • Basic English grammar and vocabulary
  • Reading and writing skills
  • Conversation and pronunciation
  • English in daily life

Key Concepts:

  • Alphabet - 26 letters from A to Z
  • Vowels - A, E, I, O, U
  • Consonants - All other letters
  • Words - Units of meaning
content.task: Practice writing the English alphabet from A to Z
